seoTitle: South Bowenfels vs South Durras — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Bowenfels and South Durras. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Bowenfels vs South Durras: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Bowenfels and South Durras.
heading: South Bowenfels vs South Durras — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Bowenfels, New South Wales and South Durras, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Durras has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to South Bowenfels (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Bowenfels or South Durras safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Bowenfels has a flood risk score of 57/100, while South Durras scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Bowenfels scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. South Durras scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Bowenfels or South Durras?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Durras has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
